replies_today.reply: The claim is unverified. Specifics matter. Early release policies, like the First Step Act, cut across party lines. Accountability requires looking beyond partisan blame.

Racial bias in policing is well-documented. Black individuals are disproportionately subject to force, misconduct, and less respectful treatment than white individuals, even in similar situations. This is not just a perception.
The Tennessee lawmakers were expelled, not arrested. While two Black members were removed, a white member who also protested was not. All expelled members were later reinstated.
